sentences.spanish: Carlos Slim posee varios negocios en México y América Latina, ¿no?
sentences.english: Carlos Slim owns several businesses in México and Latin America, doesn’t he?

sentences.spanish: Los padres deben fomentar la lectura en sus hijos, ¿no?
sentences.english: Parents must foster reading in their children, mustn’t they?

sentences.spanish: Ese collar abarata ese hermoso vestido, ¿no?
sentences.english: That necklace cheapens that beautiful dress, doesn’t it?

sentences.spanish: Existe la creencia generalizada de que los Milenials no tienen un verdadero compromiso con el trabajo, ¿no?
sentences.english: There’s a widspread belief that Milenials don’t have a true commitment with work, isn’t there?

sentences.spanish: Su casa tiene un gran jardín, ¿no?
sentences.english: Their house has a big garden, doesn’t it?

sentences.spanish: Luis dijo rotundamente que no nos ayudará con esto, ¿no?
sentences.english: Luis said outright that he won’t help us with this, didn’t he?

sentences.spanish: Prefiere pollo en lugar de cerdo, ¿no?
sentences.english: It prefers chicken instead of pork, doesn’t it?

sentences.spanish: Las películas de superhéroes atraen a la mayoría de la gente, ¿no?
sentences.english: Superheroe movies appeal to most of people, don’t they?

sentences.spanish: Esa conferencia fue muy edificante, ¿no?
sentences.english: That conference was so uplifting, wasn’t it?

sentences.spanish: La mayoría de la gente no fomenta los valores en casa, ¿verdad?
sentences.english: Most people don’t foster values at home, do they?

sentences.spanish: Ya nada nos detendrá.
sentences.english: Nothing is going to stop us now.

sentences.spanish: ¿Vendrás después del trabajo?
sentences.english: Are you going to come after work?

sentences.spanish: Voy a pasear al perro.
sentences.english: I am going to walk the dog.

sentences.spanish: ¿Vamos a tener una reunión esta tarde?
sentences.english: Are we going to have a meeting this afternoon?

sentences.spanish: Ella nunca va sola al cine.
sentences.english: She never goes to the movies alone.

sentences.spanish: Mi mamá me va a matar.
sentences.english: My mom is going to kill me.

sentences.spanish: Nunca voy a olvidar esto.
sentences.english: I am never going to forget this.

sentences.spanish: ¿México va a ganar el mundial en el 2020?
sentences.english: Is mexico going to win the world cup in the 2020?

sentences.spanish: Mi primo va a ganar mucho dinero con su nuevo negocio.
sentences.english: My cousin is going to win a lot of money with his new business.

sentences.spanish: Esta noche iré al supermercado.
sentences.english: I will go to the supermarket tonight.

sentences.spanish: Voy a escribir mis informes más tarde.
sentences.english: I am going to write my reports later.

sentences.spanish: Shakira y maluma van a grabar un nuevo disco juntos.
sentences.english: Shakira and maluma are going to record a new album together.

sentences.spanish: Mis amigos no irán a la playa porque tendrán una reunión familiar.
sentences.english: My friends will not go to the beach because they will have a family gathering.

sentences.spanish: Iré temprano al banco porque voy a pagar mi tarjeta de crédito.
sentences.english: I will go to the bank early because I am going to pay my credit card.

sentences.spanish: No vas a creer esto.
sentences.english: You are not going to believe this.

sentences.spanish: Mi papá solía ir a pescar conmigo los fines de semana.
sentences.english: My dad used to go fishing with me on weekends.

sentences.spanish: ¿Bebías mucho?.
sentences.english: Did you used to drink a lot?.

sentences.spanish: Solía ​​trabajar en una empresa internacional.
sentences.english: I used to work in an international company.

sentences.spanish: Mi jefe no solía viajar en avión.
sentences.english: My boss didn't used to travel by plane.

sentences.spanish: Mi departamento solía tener las mayores ventas.
sentences.english: My department used to have the highest sales.

sentences.spanish: Solíamos no descansar los domingos.
sentences.english: We used to not rest on sundays.

sentences.spanish: Mucha gente solía esperar con ansias el lanzamiento de los nuevos productos de la empresa.
sentences.english: Many people used to look forward to the launch of the company’s new products.

sentences.spanish: ¿El gerente solía ayudar a los trabajadores?
sentences.english: Did the manager used to help the workers?

sentences.spanish: Los clientes solían volver.
sentences.english: Customers used to come back.

sentences.spanish: Solía ​​comprar los productos de la empresa porque eran buenos.
sentences.english: I used to buy the company’s products because they were good.

sentences.spanish: El gobierno tiene que fomentar el deporte.
sentences.english: The government has to encourage sport.

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué vas a desayunar?
sentences.english: What are you going to have for breakfast?

sentences.spanish: Mis amigos tienen un apartamento en Miami.
sentences.english: My friends have an apartment in Miami.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tienes que ir a esa fiesta?
sentences.english: Do you have to go to that party?

sentences.spanish: Lo pasé increíble el verano pasado en Londres.
sentences.english: I had an amazing time last summer in London.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tuviste que ponerte de puntillas para alcanzar el frasco?
sentences.english: Did you have to stand on tiptoes to reach the jar?

sentences.spanish: Contrataré a una persona para la recepción porque no tengo suficiente personal.
sentences.english: I will hire a person for the reception because I do not have enough staff.

sentences.spanish: Debe tomar el medicamento según lo recomendado por el médico.
sentences.english: You should take the medicine as the doctor recommended.

sentences.spanish: Mis hijos pasarán un verano extraordinario en el campamento.
sentences.english: My children will spend an extraordinary summer in the camp.

sentences.spanish: ¿El amigo del señor Smith tiene sucursal en Puebla?
sentences.english: Does the Mr. Smith’s friend have a branch in Puebla?

sentences.spanish: ¿Hemos estudiado lo suficiente para el examen?
sentences.english: Have we studied enough for the exam?

sentences.spanish: ¿Has viajado alguna vez en un crucero?
sentences.english: Have you ever traveled on a cruise?

sentences.spanish: Mi hermano ha intentado ganarme jugando al Monopoly pero no lo ha conseguido.
sentences.english: My brother has tried to beat me playing Monopoly but he has not succeded.

sentences.spanish: Silvester Stallone ha actuado en muchas películas desde que era joven.
sentences.english: Silvester Stallone has acted in many movies since he was young.

sentences.spanish: Maluma lanzó su primer álbum en 2004 y desde entonces ha grabado álbumes con muchos artistas internacionales.
sentences.english: Maluma released his first album in 2004 and has recorded albums with many international artists since then.

sentences.spanish: Suzzane Collins ha escrito algunos libros maravillosos como Los juegos del hambre.
sentences.english: Suzzane Collins has written some wonderful books like The Hunger Games.

sentences.spanish: ¿Por qué los humanos no han comprendido que la naturaleza es lo más importante del planeta?
sentences.english: Why haven’t humans understood that nature is the most important thing on earth?

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué he hecho con mi vida?
sentences.english: What have I done with my life?

sentences.spanish: No he olvidado mi primer beso.
sentences.english: I haven’t forgotten my first kiss.

sentences.spanish: Los trabajadores han manipulado este tipo de producto antes y saben que es peligroso.
sentences.english: The workers have handled this type of product before and know that it's dangerous.

sentences.spanish: La calidad de este producto ha disminuido, ya no dura tanto.
sentences.english: The quality of this product has decreased, it doesn't last as long anymore.

sentences.spanish: Los neumáticos de mi coche se han desgastado, pero todavía no puedo permitirme el lujo de comprar unos nuevos.
sentences.english: The tires on my car have worn out, but I still can't afford to buy new ones.

sentences.spanish: ¿Han manejado también este tipo de producto?
sentences.english: Have they also handled this type of product?

sentences.spanish: Ese terrible producto ya ha dañado la reputación de la empresa.
sentences.english: That terrible product has already damaged the company's reputation.

sentences.spanish: ¿La nueva serie de Netflix también durará 3 temporadas?
sentences.english: Will the new Netflix series also last for 3 seasons?

sentences.spanish: ¿Alguna vez has conducido ese auto deportivo?
sentences.english: Have you ever driven that sports car?

sentences.spanish: Slim todavía controla el 80 por ciento de las telecomunicaciones en México.
sentences.english: Mr. Slim still controls 80 percent of the telecommunications in Mexico.

sentences.spanish: He trabajado en restaurantes antes, así que sé cómo manejar las finanzas y el inventario.
sentences.english: I have worked in restaurants before, so I know how to handle finances and inventory.

sentences.spanish: ¿La señora Jobs todavía tiene acciones de Apple o ya las vendió?
sentences.english: Does Mrs. Jobs still have shares in Apple, or has she already sold them?

sentences.spanish: He aprendido muchas cosas nuevas desde que me matriculé en Know How.
sentences.english: I have learned many new things since I enrolled in Know How.

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuál es la película más aterradora que has visto jamás?
sentences.english: What's the scariest movie you've ever seen?

sentences.spanish: La película animada "Up" trata sobre un anciano que ha vivido en la misma casa durante más de 40 años.
sentences.english: The animated movie "Up" is about an old man who has lived in the same old house for over 40 years.

sentences.spanish: Llevo más de 10 años viendo películas independientes y me encantan.
sentences.english: I have been watching independent movies for over 10 years, and I love them.

sentences.spanish: Steven Spielberg lleva 10 años preparando el estreno de la tercera película de "Gremlins". Finalmente, Gremlins 3 se lanzará a finales de 2018.
sentences.english: Steven Spielberg has been preparing the release of the 3rd "Gremlins" movie for 10 years. Finally, Gremlins 3 will be released in late 2018.

sentences.spanish: Alejandro González Iñárritu ganó un Oscar al Mejor Director con la película "Birdman", pero no ha vuelto a ganar otro Oscar al Mejor Director desde entonces.
sentences.english: Alejandro Gonzalez Iñarritu won an Oscar for Best Director with the movie "Birdman," but he hasn't won another Oscar for Best Director since then.

sentences.spanish: Steven Spielberg inició su carrera como director hace tres décadas. Desde entonces ha dirigido muchas películas de gran éxito.
sentences.english: Steven Spielberg started his directing career three decades ago. He has directed many blockbuster films since then.

sentences.spanish: Rachel McAdams ha protagonizado algunas películas románticas y ganó un Oscar a la Mejor Actriz de Reparto por su papel en la película "Spotlight".
sentences.english: Rachel McAdams has starred in some romantic movies and won an Oscar for Best Supporting Actress for her role in the movie "Spotlight."

sentences.spanish: "Saw" comenzó como una película de bajo presupuesto pero se ha convertido en una de las mejores películas de terror de todos los tiempos.
sentences.english: "Saw" started as a low-budget movie but has become one of the best horror movies of all time.

sentences.spanish: Jared Leto ha interpretado diferentes personajes en el cine desde su debut en 1995 en la película "Cómo hacer una colcha americana", donde interpretó a un joven amante. Ha sido nominado a varios premios de la Academia y ganó un Oscar al Mejor Actor de Reparto en la película "Dallas Buyers Club", donde interpretó a un personaje transgénero.
sentences.english: Jared Leto has portrayed different characters in films since his debut in 1995 in the movie "How to Make an American Quilt," where he played a young lover. He has been nominated for several Academy Awards and won an Oscar for Best Supporting Actor in the movie "Dallas Buyers Club," where he portrayed a transgender character.

sentences.spanish: ¿Se legalizarán los matrimonios entre humanos y máquinas dentro de 50 años?
sentences.english: Will marriages between humans and machines be legalized in 50 years?

sentences.spanish: ¿El amor hacia las máquinas con Inteligencia Artificial sustituirá al amor hacia las personas?
sentences.english: Will love towards machines with Artificial Intelligence replace love towards people?

sentences.spanish: Los humanos habrán olvidado la vida tal como la conocemos hoy.
sentences.english: Humans will have forgotten life as we know it today.

sentences.spanish: ¿La Inteligencia Artificial habrá sustituido a los humanos en sus puestos de trabajo dentro de 20 años?
sentences.english: Will Artificial Intelligence have replaced humans in their jobs within 20 years?

sentences.spanish: Para entonces, las mascotas reales habrán desaparecido y los humanos preferirán tener robots.
sentences.english: By then, real pets will have disappeared, and humans will prefer to have robots.

sentences.spanish: Dentro de 20 años, los robots habrán desempeñado un papel importante en la vida de los humanos.
sentences.english: In 20 years, robots will have played a significant role in the lives of humans.

sentences.spanish: En poco tiempo la mayoría de personas habrá tenido algún tipo de interacción con un robot.
sentences.english: In a short time, the majority of people will have had some kind of interaction with a robot.

sentences.spanish: La Inteligencia Artificial habrá llegado a la mayoría de las personas en menos de 20 años.
sentences.english: Artificial Intelligence will have reached the majority of people in less than 20 years.

sentences.spanish: Cuando los humanos se den cuenta, las máquinas habrán tomado el control.
sentences.english: When humans realize it, machines will have taken control.

sentences.spanish: En el futuro, las máquinas serán más inteligentes que los seres humanos.
sentences.english: In the future, machines will have become more intelligent than human beings.

sentences.spanish: No ha habido cambios en el estado del paciente.
sentences.english: There have been no changes in the patient's condition.

sentences.spanish: Desde entonces, ha habido innumerables actos de violencia en el país.
sentences.english: Since then, there have been countless acts of violence in the country.

sentences.spanish: Ha habido importantes diferencias de opinión con respecto a los candidatos.
sentences.english: There have been significant differences of opinion regarding the candidates.

sentences.spanish: En Chechenia hay guerras desde hace 300 años.
sentences.english: There have been wars in Chechnya for 300 years.

sentences.spanish: ¿Ha habido algún diálogo entre Estados Unidos y Corea del Norte sobre este tema?
sentences.english: Has there been any dialogue between the United States and North Korea regarding this issue?

sentences.spanish: Nunca ha habido ningún problema en la fábrica desde que usted se convirtió en director.
sentences.english: There has never been a problem at the factory since you became the director.

sentences.spanish: Ha habido buena comunicación entre ambos equipos hasta cierto punto.
sentences.english: There has been good communication between both teams to some extent.

sentences.spanish: ¿Se han matriculado nuevos estudiantes en el curso?
sentences.english: Have there been any new students enrolled in the course?

sentences.spanish: ¿Ha habido resultados reales en términos de seguridad últimamente?
sentences.english: Have there been any real results in terms of security lately?

sentences.spanish: ¿Alguien ha estado más tiempo al aire en un programa de televisión que Chabelo?
sentences.english: Has anyone been on the air in a TV show for a longer time than Chabelo?

sentences.spanish: Algo debe haber pasado.
sentences.english: Something must have happened.

sentences.spanish: Karla debió haberse ido; no puedes encontrarla.
sentences.english: Karla must have left; you can't find her.

sentences.spanish: Crees que Ronald debió haber caminado desde aquí. Puedes ver sus huellas.
sentences.english: You think Ronald must have walked from here. You can see his footprints.

sentences.spanish: No puedes creer que Susan se haya hecho un tatuaje; debe haber dolido mucho.
sentences.english: You can't believe that Susan got a tattoo; it must have hurt a lot.

sentences.spanish: Los científicos debieron haber encontrado algo importante en la cueva; Han estado allí todo el día.
sentences.english: Scientists must have found something important in the cave; they have been there all day.

sentences.spanish: Debió resultarle muy difícil afrontar sus problemas.
sentences.english: It must have been very difficult for him to face his problems.

sentences.spanish: Debe haber sido un terremoto lo que sacudió tu casa esta mañana.
sentences.english: It must have been an earthquake that shook your house this morning.

sentences.spanish: Los Simpson debieron haber regresado a Springfield. Aquí no se sentían como en casa.
sentences.english: The Simpsons must have returned to Springfield. They didn't feel at home here.

sentences.spanish: Debió haber llevado mucho tiempo construir ese puente.
sentences.english: It must have taken a long time to build that bridge.

sentences.spanish: Debe haber sido fantástico vivir en el Viejo Oeste.
sentences.english: It must have been fantastic to live in the Old West.

sentences.spanish: Podría haber muerto en ese accidente.
sentences.english: I could have died in that accident.

sentences.spanish: Ella podría haberte dicho la verdad.
sentences.english: She could have told you the truth.

sentences.spanish: No podría haberse olvidado de nosotros.
sentences.english: She couldn't have forgotten about us.

sentences.spanish: Ese auto podría haber sido tuyo.
sentences.english: That car could have been yours.

sentences.spanish: Podrías haber ingresado a esa universidad.
sentences.english: You could have gotten into that university.

sentences.spanish: No podría haber sido mejor.
sentences.english: It couldn't have been better.

sentences.spanish: Dile a la persona que está contigo que podría haber comprado un teléfono móvil mejor que este.
sentences.english: Tell the person with you that they could have bought a better cellphone than this.

sentences.spanish: Estaba disfrazado, por lo que no pudieron haberme visto.
sentences.english: I was disguised, so they couldn't have seen me.

sentences.spanish: Netflix podría haber comprado Blockbuster, pero decidieron quedarse como estaban.
sentences.english: Blockbuster could have been bought by Netflix, but they decided to stay as they were.

sentences.spanish: La guerra podría haber terminado si el ejército alemán se hubiera rendido antes.
sentences.english: The war could have ended if the German army had surrendered earlier.

sentences.spanish: Las lluvias torrenciales podrían provocar que el río inunde la ciudad.
sentences.english: The torrential rain could cause the river to flood the city.

sentences.spanish: Es posible que la persona que está contigo tenga su teléfono en la sala de estar.
sentences.english: The person with you might have their phone in the living room.

sentences.spanish: Podríamos quedarnos en casa y ver una película o salir a cenar.
sentences.english: We could stay at home and watch a movie or go out for dinner.

sentences.spanish: Podrías ir con él, pero hay que estudiar.
sentences.english: You could go with him, but you have to study.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puedo usar la computadora de la persona que está contigo para enviarle un correo electrónico a mi jefe?
sentences.english: Could I use the person's computer with you to send an email to my boss?

sentences.spanish: Podría estar muerta; necesitamos encontrarla.
sentences.english: She could be dead; we need to find her.

sentences.spanish: Podrías visitar a tu hermano todos los fines de semana en Puebla, pero no tienes tanto dinero.
sentences.english: You could visit your brother every weekend in Puebla, but you don't have that much money.

sentences.spanish: Podrías ganar la lotería.
sentences.english: You could win the lottery.

sentences.spanish: No podrías mirar directamente al sol durante más de 3 segundos sin tus ojos de águila.
sentences.english: You couldn't stare directly at the sun for more than 3 seconds without your eagle eyes.

sentences.spanish: Podría ser.
sentences.english: It could be.

sentences.spanish: Podría haber una oportunidad para las personas que están con usted en su empresa.
sentences.english: There could be an opportunity for the people with you in your company.

sentences.spanish: Deberías llevar impermeable porque está lloviendo.
sentences.english: You should wear a raincoat because it's raining.

sentences.spanish: El policía nos paró y nos dijo que condujéramos más despacio.
sentences.english: The police officer stopped us and told us that we should drive slower.

sentences.spanish: No deberías comer tanta comida chatarra.
sentences.english: You shouldn't eat so much junk food.

sentences.spanish: La mercancía china que compraste online debería llegar la próxima semana.
sentences.english: The Chinese merchandise you bought online should arrive next week.

sentences.spanish: Si la persona que está contigo ya leyó "Los juegos del hambre", debería ver la película.
sentences.english: If the person with you has already read "The Hunger Games," they should watch the movie.

sentences.spanish: Todos los empleados de esta empresa deberían realizar un curso de atención al cliente.
sentences.english: All employees in this company should take a customer service course.

sentences.spanish: ¿Deberían los padres dejar que sus hijos utilicen sus teléfonos todo el tiempo?
sentences.english: Should parents let their children use their phones all the time?

sentences.spanish: La maestra me dijo que debería estudiar más.
sentences.english: The teacher told me that I should study more.

sentences.spanish: ¿La persona que te acompaña podría recomendarme alguna pastilla o debo ir al médico?
sentences.english: Could the person with you recommend a pill or should I go to the doctor?

sentences.spanish: Debería tener suficiente dinero el próximo mes para comprar un auto.
sentences.english: I should have enough money next month to buy a car.

sentences.spanish: ¿No deberían estar en la escuela en lugar de jugar videojuegos?
sentences.english: Shouldn't they be in school instead of playing video games?

sentences.spanish: Es muy tarde y ese niño no debería estar solo en la calle.
sentences.english: It's very late, and that child shouldn't be alone on the street.

sentences.spanish: Debieron haberte ayudado a decorar el departamento, pero prefirieron ir a una fiesta, así que tuviste que hacerlo solo.
sentences.english: They should have helped you decorate the apartment, but they preferred to go to a party, so you had to do it alone.

sentences.spanish: Sus padres no les dejan jugar si no terminan sus deberes.
sentences.english: Their parents don't let them play if they don't finish their homework.

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué pasa si no abrimos la tienda a tiempo?
sentences.english: What happens if we don't open the store on time?

sentences.spanish: Cuando un concursante gana, le damos un premio y reconocimiento.
sentences.english: When a contestant wins, we give them a prize and recognition.

sentences.spanish: Si la persona que está contigo está estudiando diseño gráfico, necesita comprar una computadora más rápida.
sentences.english: If the person with you is studying graphic design, they need to buy a faster computer.

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué pasa cuando el amor termina?
sentences.english: What happens when love ends?

sentences.spanish: Si estudiamos todos los días, los exámenes no son difíciles.
sentences.english: If we study every day, the exams are not difficult.

sentences.spanish: Si un hombre deja que la ira lo controle, puede cometer un error fatal.
sentences.english: If a man lets anger control him, he can make a fatal mistake.

sentences.spanish: No necesitamos dinero si tenemos amor.
sentences.english: We don't need money if we have love.

sentences.spanish: Si hacen lo que les dices, no deberían preocuparse.
sentences.english: If they do as you tell them, they shouldn't be worried.

sentences.spanish: La gente tiene mejores oportunidades cuando el gobierno fomenta el espíritu empresarial.
sentences.english: People have better opportunities when the government encourages entrepreneurship.

sentences.spanish: Si los Dodgers pierden contra los Medias Rojas, los Yankees serán los campeones de la temporada.
sentences.english: If the Dodgers lose against the Red Sox, the Yankees will be the champions of the season.

sentences.spanish: La gente se volverá loca si México gana el Mundial.
sentences.english: People will go crazy if Mexico wins the World Cup.

sentences.spanish: ¿Engordarías si comieras pizza todos los días?
sentences.english: Would you gain weight if you eat pizza every day?

sentences.spanish: Si estudias inglés, serás contratado por una empresa internacional.
sentences.english: If you study English, you will be hired by an international company.

sentences.spanish: Los inversionistas no abandonarán el país si AMLO llega a la presidencia.
sentences.english: Investors will not leave the country if AMLO becomes president.

sentences.spanish: Si la gente sigue usando bolsas de plástico y pajitas, la naturaleza sufrirá las consecuencias.
sentences.english: If people continue to use plastic bags and straws, nature will suffer the consequences.

sentences.spanish: Si sigues así, pronto terminarás tu curso de inglés.
sentences.english: If you keep going like this, you will soon finish your English course.

sentences.spanish: Si ahorras, pronto podrás irte de vacaciones a donde quieras.
sentences.english: If you save, you will soon be able to go on vacation anywhere you want.

sentences.spanish: La persona que está contigo se enfermará si no usa chaqueta.
sentences.english: The person with you will get sick if they don't wear a jacket.

sentences.spanish: Saldré del hotel a las 3:00 p. m. si mi vuelo sale a las 5:00 p. m.
sentences.english: I will be checking out of the hotel at 3 pm if my flight is at 5.

sentences.spanish: Si yo fuera tú, no compraría un móvil tan caro.
sentences.english: If I were you, I wouldn't buy such an expensive cellphone.

sentences.spanish: Si me ganara la lotería, viajaría por el mundo.
sentences.english: If I won the lottery, I would travel the world.

sentences.spanish: Los niños no odiarían la escuela si fuera divertida.
sentences.english: Kids wouldn't hate school if it was fun.

sentences.spanish: ¿Por qué elegirías estudiar en Estados Unidos en lugar de aprovechar la oportunidad de estudiar en Londres?
sentences.english: Why would you choose to study in the United States instead of taking the opportunity to study in London?

sentences.spanish: Si tuviera los documentos ya se los habría mostrado al juez.
sentences.english: If she had the documents, she would have already shown them to the judge.

sentences.spanish: Si mi médico me dijera que me quedan dos meses de vida, pasaría tiempo con mis seres queridos.
sentences.english: If my doctor told me I had two months to live, I would spend time with my loved ones.

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué animal te gustaría ser si fueras uno?
sentences.english: What animal would you like to be if you were one?

sentences.spanish: Si tuviera superpoderes, tal vez podría volar.
sentences.english: If I had superpowers, maybe I could fly.

sentences.spanish: ¿Adónde te gustaría ir en tus próximas vacaciones si tuvieras suficiente dinero?
sentences.english: Where would you like to go on your next vacation if you had enough money?

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué harías si terminaras tu curso de inglés hoy?
sentences.english: What would you do if you finished your English course today?

sentences.spanish: Si hubieras llegado a tiempo a la entrevista de trabajo te habrían contratado.
sentences.english: If you had arrived on time to the job interview, they would have hired you.

sentences.spanish: Si hubieras sabido que ella vendría, habrías usado una camiseta diferente.
sentences.english: If you had known that she was coming, you would have worn a different shirt.

sentences.spanish: Tu novio/novia no se habría enojado si no hubieras olvidado tu aniversario.
sentences.english: Your boyfriend/girlfriend wouldn't have gotten mad if you hadn't forgotten your anniversary.

sentences.spanish: Habrías pedido el pastel de coco si no hubiera tenido pasas.
sentences.english: You would have ordered the coconut cake if it hadn't had raisins.

sentences.spanish: ¿Habrían podido terminar el proyecto si hubieran tenido más tiempo?
sentences.english: Would they have been able to finish the project if they had more time?

sentences.spanish: No habrías nacido si tus padres no se hubieran conocido.
sentences.english: You wouldn't have been born if your parents hadn't met.

sentences.spanish: Si tuvieras más tiempo, lo pasarías con tu familia.
sentences.english: If you had more time, you would spend it with your family.

sentences.spanish: No te habrías enojado tanto si te hubiera dicho la verdad.
sentences.english: You wouldn't have gotten so angry if he had told you the truth.

sentences.spanish: No habríamos roto si no hubieras ido a Nueva York.
sentences.english: We wouldn't have broken up if you hadn't gone to New York.

sentences.spanish: Brasil podría haber ganado el Mundial de Rusia si Bélgica no los hubiera derrotado.
sentences.english: Brazil could have won the World Cup in Russia if Belgium hadn't defeated them.

sentences.spanish: Si quieres ganar más dinero, deberías buscar trabajo en el extranjero.
sentences.english: If you want to earn more money, you should look for a job abroad.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona que está contigo qué haría si tuviera un millón de dólares.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you what they would do if they had a million dollars.

sentences.spanish: Si ganaras la lotería, viajarías por el mundo.
sentences.english: If you won the lottery, you would travel the world.

sentences.spanish: Si no hubieran estado bebiendo, no habrían tenido ese accidente fatal.
sentences.english: If they hadn't been drinking, they wouldn't have had that fatal accident.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona que está contigo qué haría si alguien la asaltara.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you what they would do if someone mugged them.

sentences.spanish: Si hubiera hablado contigo, la habrías escuchado y le habrías dado buenos consejos.
sentences.english: If she had talked to you, you would have listened to her and given her good advice.

sentences.spanish: Si queremos trabajar más rápido, necesitaremos una computadora más nueva.
sentences.english: If we want to work faster, we'll need a newer computer.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona que está contigo si le prestaría dinero a Mike y recuérdale que no le devolvió el dinero la última vez.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you if they would lend money to Mike, and remind them that he didn't pay them back last time.

sentences.spanish: El cemento traslúcido fue lanzado hace un par de años por una empresa mexicana.
sentences.english: Translucent cement was launched a couple of years ago by a Mexican company.

sentences.spanish: John debería ser ascendido el próximo año ya que fue el mejor trabajador durante este año.
sentences.english: John should be promoted next year as he was the best worker during this year.

sentences.spanish: Aún no se ha descubierto la cura para el cáncer; sin embargo, los científicos continúan buscándolo.
sentences.english: The cure for cancer has not been discovered yet; however, scientists continue to search for it.

sentences.spanish: ¿Quién escribió la Ilíada?
sentences.english: Who was the Iliad written by?

sentences.spanish: ¿El sistema de justicia encarcelará a los gobernadores corruptos?
sentences.english: Will corrupt governors be imprisoned by the justice system?

sentences.spanish: Mary no vino a la fiesta porque no estaba invitada.
sentences.english: Mary didn't come to the party because she wasn't invited.

sentences.spanish: Los niños están emocionados porque los llevarán al zoológico.
sentences.english: The children are excited because they will be taken to the zoo.

sentences.spanish: ¿Por qué la mayoría de las celebridades odian ser fotografiadas por paparazzi?
sentences.english: Why do most celebrities hate being photographed by paparazzi?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuántos niños nacen cada día en este hospital?
sentences.english: How many children are born each day in this hospital?

sentences.spanish: Javier Duarte será juzgado el próximo año y es posible que sea encarcelado.
sentences.english: Javier Duarte will be tried next year, and it's possible that he will be imprisoned.

sentences.spanish: No encuentro mi nombre en la lista, pero seguiré buscando.
sentences.english: I can't find my name on the list, but I will keep searching.

sentences.spanish: Me pondré en contacto con el ingeniero en Minnesota.
sentences.english: I will get in touch with the engineer in Minnesota.

sentences.spanish: Todavía no he encontrado a la persona que busco.
sentences.english: I still haven't found the person I'm looking for.

sentences.spanish: ¿Por qué esos niños excluyeron a Sophie del juego?
sentences.english: Why did those children exclude Sophie from the game?

sentences.spanish: David y Martha adelantaron su boda porque la mayoría de sus amigos no pudieron asistir en diciembre.
sentences.english: David and Martha moved up their wedding because most of their friends couldn't attend in December.

sentences.spanish: Mi auto necesita reparaciones.
sentences.english: My car needs repairs.

sentences.spanish: ¿No piensas dejar de fumar?
sentences.english: Don't you plan on quitting smoking?

sentences.spanish: Esas personas necesitan detenerse y pensar en sus acciones.
sentences.english: Those people need to stop and think about their actions.

sentences.spanish: Ella no pudo evitar enamorarse de él.
sentences.english: She couldn't help but fall in love with him.

sentences.spanish: Debes caminar dos cuadras más por esta misma calle para llegar al parque central.
sentences.english: You need to walk two more blocks on this same street to reach the central park.

sentences.spanish: Sé que no quiso decir eso, pero de todos modos me dolió.
sentences.english: I know she didn't mean to say that, but it hurt me anyway.

sentences.spanish: Para mí la infidelidad significa decir adiós.
sentences.english: To me, infidelity means saying goodbye.

sentences.spanish: ¿Quieres seguir viviendo así?
sentences.english: Do you want to continue living like this?

sentences.spanish: Después de la reunión, iremos a tomar unas copas.
sentences.english: After the meeting, we'll go grab some drinks.

sentences.spanish: Ya hablé con él, pero todavía cree en otra cosa.
sentences.english: I already spoke to him, but he still believes something else.

sentences.spanish: Ese libro cambió mi vida.
sentences.english: That book changed my life.

sentences.spanish: Está lloviendo.
sentences.english: It 's raining.

sentences.spanish: ¿La clase de manejo puede ser el domingo?
sentences.english: Can the driving lesson be on Sunday?

sentences.spanish: No me gusta nadar solo.
sentences.english: I don’t like swimming alone.

sentences.spanish: La sala de lectura es un lugar muy tranquilo.
sentences.english: The reading room is a very peaceful place.

sentences.spanish: María está hablando con su jefe.
sentences.english: Mary is talking to her boss.

sentences.spanish: No me mientas.
sentences.english: Don’t lie to me.

sentences.spanish: Camine hacia el norte por la Quinta Avenida.
sentences.english: Walk to the north on Fifth Avenue.

sentences.spanish: Gire a la derecha en la esquina de Arlington Street.
sentences.english: Turn right on the corner of Arlington Street.

sentences.spanish: Camine recto 100 metros por Arlington Road y encontrará un Macdonald's a la izquierda.
sentences.english: Walk straight 100 meters on Arlington Road and you will find a Macdonald’s on the left.

sentences.spanish: Pide una hamburguesa con queso y patatas fritas y tráemelas.
sentences.english: Ask for a cheese burger and chips and bring them to me.

sentences.spanish: Insistió en que Peter se fuera inmediatamente.
sentences.english: He insisted that Peter leave immediately.

sentences.spanish: Janet convenció a Danielle para que me llevara al aeropuerto.
sentences.english: Janet convinced Danielle to take me to the airport.

sentences.spanish: Gary está instalando el estéreo en mi auto en su garaje.
sentences.english: Gary is installing the stereo in my car in his garage.

sentences.spanish: Le pidió a su hermana que me tradujera el artículo.
sentences.english: She asked her sister to translate the article for me.

sentences.spanish: Finalmente convencí a mi arrendador para que cambiara la cerradura.
sentences.english: I finally convinced my landlord to change the lock.

sentences.spanish: Mi mamá insistió en que usara ese vestido para la fiesta.
sentences.english: My mom insisted that I wear that dress to the party.

sentences.spanish: Le pediré a John que me recoja en la estación.
sentences.english: I will ask John to pick me up at the station.

sentences.spanish: Me pidió que comprara algunos bocadillos para la reunión.
sentences.english: She asked me to buy some snacks for the gathering.

sentences.spanish: La policía insistió en que deberíamos quedarnos en casa.
sentences.english: The police insisted that we should stay at home.

sentences.spanish: Intentaré convencerlo de que me pague el dinero que me debe.
sentences.english: I will try to convince him to pay me the money he owes.

sentences.spanish: La recepcionista me pidió que esperara afuera de su oficina.
sentences.english: The receptionist asked me to wait outside her office.

sentences.spanish: El médico insistió en que fuéramos al hospital.
sentences.english: The doctor insisted that we go to the hospital.

sentences.spanish: Debe hacer ejercicio con regularidad para mantenerse saludable.
sentences.english: You should exercise regularly to stay healthy.

sentences.spanish: Los estudiantes deberían prestar más atención en clase para mejorar sus calificaciones.
sentences.english: Students should pay more attention in class to improve their grades.

sentences.spanish: Deberíamos ser más conscientes del medio ambiente y reducir nuestro consumo de plástico.
sentences.english: We should be more environmentally conscious and reduce our plastic consumption.

sentences.spanish: Los gobiernos deberían invertir más en educación y atención sanitaria.
sentences.english: Governments should invest more in education and healthcare.

sentences.spanish: Los conductores deben respetar los límites de velocidad para evitar accidentes.
sentences.english: Drivers should respect speed limits to avoid accidents.

sentences.spanish: Las empresas deberían implementar políticas de trabajo flexible para mejorar la calidad de vida de sus empleados.
sentences.english: Companies should implement flexible work policies to improve their employees' quality of life.

sentences.spanish: Todos deberíamos practicar la empatía y tratar a los demás con amabilidad.
sentences.english: We should all practice empathy and treat others with kindness.

sentences.spanish: Se debe animar a los niños a leer más para desarrollar su imaginación.
sentences.english: Children should be encouraged to read more to develop their imagination.

sentences.spanish: Los ciudadanos deben ejercer su derecho al voto para participar en la democracia.
sentences.english: Citizens should exercise their right to vote to participate in democracy.

sentences.spanish: Deberíamos ahorrar más dinero para tener una mayor estabilidad financiera.
sentences.english: We should save more money to have greater financial stability.

sentences.spanish: Es importante mantener una dieta equilibrada y hacer ejercicio regularmente para llevar un estilo de vida saludable.
sentences.english: It's important to maintain a balanced diet and exercise regularly to lead a healthy lifestyle.

sentences.spanish: Es fundamental marcarse metas claras y trabajar duro para conseguir nuestros objetivos.
sentences.english: It's essential to set clear goals and work hard to achieve our objectives.

sentences.spanish: Debemos aprender de nuestros errores y utilizarlos como oportunidades de crecimiento.
sentences.english: We should learn from our mistakes and use them as opportunities for growth.

sentences.spanish: Es crucial mantener una actitud positiva y optimista ante los desafíos de la vida.
sentences.english: It's crucial to maintain a positive and optimistic attitude in the face of life's challenges.

sentences.spanish: Debemos practicar la gratitud y apreciar las cosas buenas que tenemos en nuestras vidas.
sentences.english: We should practice gratitude and appreciate the good things we have in our lives.

sentences.spanish: Es importante respetar las diferencias entre las personas y promover la inclusión y la diversidad.
sentences.english: It's important to respect the differences between people and promote inclusion and diversity.

sentences.spanish: Debemos cuidar el medio ambiente y adoptar prácticas sostenibles para proteger el planeta.
sentences.english: We should take care of the environment and adopt sustainable practices to protect the planet.

sentences.spanish: Ser empático y comprensivo con los demás, mostrar empatía hacia sus sentimientos y experiencias, es fundamental.
sentences.english: Being empathetic and understanding with others, showing empathy towards their feelings and experiences, is essential.

sentences.spanish: Debemos ser responsables y asumir las consecuencias de nuestras acciones.
sentences.english: We should be responsible and take the consequences of our actions.

sentences.spanish: Es importante mantener una comunicación abierta y honesta en nuestras relaciones personales y profesionales.
sentences.english: It's important to maintain open and honest communication in our personal and professional relationships.

sentences.spanish: La educación es la clave para el desarrollo personal y el progreso de la sociedad.
sentences.english: Education is the key to personal development and the progress of society.

sentences.spanish: Es importante cultivar la creatividad y buscar soluciones innovadoras a los problemas que enfrentamos.
sentences.english: It's important to cultivate creativity and seek innovative solutions to the problems we face.

sentences.spanish: El respeto es fundamental en todas las interacciones humanas y debe practicarse en todo momento.
sentences.english: Respect is fundamental in all human interactions and should be practiced at all times.

sentences.spanish: El trabajo en equipo es esencial para lograr objetivos más grandes y complejos.
sentences.english: Teamwork is essential to achieve larger and more complex goals.

sentences.spanish: Es importante mantenerse informado y cuestionar la información que recibimos para tener una visión más completa y precisa del mundo.
sentences.english: It's important to stay informed and question the information we receive to have a more comprehensive and accurate view of the world.

sentences.spanish: La perseverancia y la paciencia son cualidades importantes para superar obstáculos y alcanzar el éxito.
sentences.english: Perseverance and patience are important qualities to overcome obstacles and achieve success.

sentences.spanish: Debemos promover la igualdad de oportunidades para todas las personas, independientemente de su género, raza o estatus socioeconómico.
sentences.english: We should promote equal opportunities for all people, regardless of their gender, race, or socioeconomic status.

sentences.spanish: La honestidad y la integridad son valores fundamentales que deben guiar nuestras acciones y decisiones.
sentences.english: Honesty and integrity are fundamental values that should guide our actions and decisions.

sentences.spanish: El aprendizaje continuo es fundamental para mantenerse actualizado y adaptarse a un mundo en constante cambio.
sentences.english: Continuous learning is essential to stay updated and adapt to a constantly changing world.

sentences.spanish: Debemos practicar el autocuidado y dedicar tiempo a nuestro bienestar físico y emocional.
sentences.english: We should practice self-care and dedicate time to our physical and emotional well-being.

sentences.spanish: Es importante practicar la empatía y ponernos en el lugar de los demás para comprender sus sentimientos y perspectivas.
sentences.english: It's important to practice empathy and put ourselves in the shoes of others to understand their feelings and perspectives.

sentences.spanish: Deberíamos aprender a gestionar el estrés y buscar formas saludables de afrontar la presión diaria.
sentences.english: We should learn to manage stress and seek healthy ways to cope with daily pressure.

sentences.spanish: Agradecer las pequeñas cosas y no dar por sentado lo que tenemos es fundamental.
sentences.english: Being grateful for the little things and not taking what we have for granted is essential.

sentences.spanish: Debemos ser conscientes de nuestro impacto en el medio ambiente y tomar medidas para reducir nuestra huella ecológica.
sentences.english: We must be conscious of our impact on the environment and take steps to reduce our ecological footprint.

sentences.spanish: La honestidad y la transparencia en nuestras acciones fomentan la confianza en las relaciones personales y profesionales.
sentences.english: Honesty and transparency in our actions foster trust in personal and professional relationships.

sentences.spanish: Debemos buscar oportunidades de crecimiento personal y profesional para seguir evolucionando.
sentences.english: We should seek opportunities for personal and professional growth to keep evolving.

sentences.spanish: El perdón es una muestra de madurez emocional y una liberación del resentimiento.
sentences.english: Forgiveness is a display of emotional maturity and a release from resentment.

sentences.spanish: Establecer límites saludables en nuestras relaciones es importante para proteger nuestro bienestar emocional.
sentences.english: Establishing healthy boundaries in our relationships is important to protect our emotional well-being.

sentences.spanish: Debemos valorar y nutrir nuestras amistades, ya que son pilares importantes en nuestras vidas.
sentences.english: We should value and nurture our friendships as they are important pillars in our lives.

sentences.spanish: El pensamiento positivo y una actitud proactiva nos ayudan a afrontar los retos con mayor determinación.
sentences.english: Positive thinking and a proactive attitude help us face challenges with greater determination.

sentences.spanish: Es fundamental ser responsables con nuestras finanzas y aprender a administrar nuestro dinero de forma inteligente.
sentences.english: It's essential to be responsible with our finances and learn to manage our money smartly.

sentences.spanish: Deberíamos ser humildes y reconocer que siempre hay más que aprender y mejorar.
sentences.english: We should be humble and acknowledge that there is always more to learn and improve.

sentences.spanish: Es importante practicar la autoaceptación y valorar nuestro valor, independientemente de las opiniones de los demás.
sentences.english: Practicing self-acceptance and valuing our worth, regardless of others' opinions, is important.

sentences.spanish: Debemos ser proactivos y tomar la iniciativa para perseguir nuestras metas y sueños.
sentences.english: We should be proactive and take the initiative in pursuing our goals and dreams.

sentences.spanish: El respeto a las diferencias culturales y aprender a convivir en una sociedad diversa es fundamental.
sentences.english: Respect for cultural differences and learning to coexist in a diverse society is fundamental.

sentences.spanish: Es necesario cultivar una mentalidad de crecimiento y ver los errores como oportunidades de aprendizaje.
sentences.english: Cultivating a growth mindset and viewing mistakes as learning opportunities is necessary.

sentences.spanish: Es importante ser compasivo y brindar apoyo a quienes enfrentan dificultades.
sentences.english: It's important to be compassionate and provide support to those facing difficulties.

sentences.spanish: Se debe practicar la escucha activa y la atención genuina a lo que los demás tienen que decir.
sentences.english: Active listening and genuine attention to what others have to say should be practiced.

sentences.spanish: Mantener una actitud de gratitud y reconocer las cosas buenas que nos rodean es fundamental.
sentences.english: Maintaining an attitude of gratitude and recognizing the good things around us is essential.

sentences.spanish: Ser conscientes de nuestro tiempo y dedicarlo a actividades que nos aporten valor y satisfacción es crucial.
sentences.english: Being mindful of our time and dedicating it to activities that bring us value and satisfaction is crucial.

sentences.spanish: Estaré en casa a las 5 pm.
sentences.english: I will be home at 5 pm.

sentences.spanish: No podré asistir a la reunión porque estoy enfermo.
sentences.english: I won't be able to attend the meeting because I'm sick.

sentences.spanish: Tendré que posponer el viaje debido a un problema inesperado.
sentences.english: I will have to postpone the trip due to an unexpected issue.

sentences.spanish: Iré al concierto el próximo fin de semana.
sentences.english: I will go to the concert next weekend.

sentences.spanish: No estaré disponible para la llamada hasta mañana.
sentences.english: I won't be available for the call until tomorrow.

sentences.spanish: Estaré ocupado todo el día.
sentences.english: I will be busy all day.

sentences.spanish: Estaré encantado de ayudar con el proyecto.
sentences.english: I will be happy to help with the project.

sentences.spanish: Estaré en la oficina a primera hora de la mañana.
sentences.english: I will be at the office first thing in the morning.

sentences.spanish: Los estaré esperando en el restaurante a las 7 pm.
sentences.english: I will be waiting for them at the restaurant at 7 pm.

sentences.spanish: Estaré encantado de conocer a su equipo.
sentences.english: I will be delighted to meet their team.

sentences.spanish: Cuando llegaste a casa, tu madre ya había preparado la cena.
sentences.english: When you got home, your mother had already prepared dinner.

sentences.spanish: Ya habías visto esa película antes y te encantó.
sentences.english: You had already seen that movie before, and you loved it.

sentences.spanish: Cuando llegaste al parque, ya se habían vendido todas las entradas.
sentences.english: By the time you got to the park, all the tickets had already been sold.

sentences.spanish: La tarta estaba riquísima, pero ya te habías saciado con la cena.
sentences.english: The cake was delicious, but you had already filled up with dinner.

sentences.spanish: Cuando saliste a caminar, el sol ya se había puesto.
sentences.english: When you went for a walk, the sun had already set.

sentences.spanish: Ya habías terminado tus tareas antes de que llegara la tormenta.
sentences.english: You had already finished your tasks before the storm arrived.

sentences.spanish: Cuando llegaste a la tienda, ya habían cerrado.
sentences.english: By the time you got to the store, they had already closed.

sentences.spanish: Ya habías reservado el hotel antes de iniciar el viaje.
sentences.english: You had already booked the hotel before starting the trip.

sentences.spanish: El libro ya había sido recomendado por varios amigos.
sentences.english: The book had already been recommended by several friends.

sentences.spanish: Ya habías practicado la presentación antes de entregarla a la audiencia.
sentences.english: You had already practiced the presentation before delivering it to the audience.

sentences.spanish: ¿Has estado en París antes?
sentences.english: Have you been to Paris before?

sentences.spanish: Nunca has probado el sushi.
sentences.english: You have never tried sushi.

sentences.spanish: Has leído ese libro varias veces y todavía te encanta.
sentences.english: You have read that book several times, and you still love it.

sentences.spanish: ¿Alguna vez has viajado solo?
sentences.english: Have you ever traveled alone?

sentences.spanish: Has estado ocupado con el trabajo últimamente.
sentences.english: You have been busy with work lately.

sentences.spanish: Has conocido a mucha gente interesante en tus viajes.
sentences.english: You have met many interesting people on your travels.

sentences.spanish: ¿Alguna vez has intentado escalar una montaña?
sentences.english: Have you ever tried to climb a mountain?

sentences.spanish: Has aprendido mucho en tu último año de universidad.
sentences.english: You have learned a lot in your last year of college.

sentences.spanish: ¿Has tomado clases de baile?
sentences.english: Have you taken dance classes?

sentences.spanish: Has estado practicando mucho para el examen.
sentences.english: You have been practicing a lot for the exam.

sentences.spanish: Estabas estudiando cuando recibiste la llamada.
sentences.english: You were studying when you received the call.

sentences.spanish: Estuviste en la playa todo el fin de semana pasado.
sentences.english: You were at the beach all last weekend.

sentences.spanish: Estarás ocupado mañana por la mañana.
sentences.english: You will be busy tomorrow morning.

sentences.spanish: ¿Estuvo en la fiesta anoche?
sentences.english: Was he at the party last night?

sentences.spanish: Llevas mucho tiempo esperando esa oportunidad.
sentences.english: You have been waiting for that opportunity for a long time.

sentences.spanish: Estuviste pensando en esa decisión durante días.
sentences.english: You were thinking about that decision for days.

sentences.spanish: ¿Ha estado en ese restaurante antes?
sentences.english: Has she been to that restaurant before?

sentences.spanish: Estarías dispuesto a ayudar en cualquier momento.
sentences.english: You would be willing to help anytime.

sentences.spanish: Estuviste enfermo la semana pasada.
sentences.english: You were sick last week.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tus amigos han estado en ese país?
sentences.english: Have your friends been to that country?

sentences.spanish: Has estado aprendiendo a tocar la guitarra.
sentences.english: You have been learning to play the guitar.

sentences.spanish: ¿Ha estado trabajando en ese proyecto?
sentences.english: Has she been working on that project?

sentences.spanish: Habías estado buscando esa tienda por todas partes.
sentences.english: You had been searching for that store everywhere.

sentences.spanish: Llevas seis meses practicando yoga.
sentences.english: You have been practicing yoga for six months.

sentences.spanish: ¿Ha estado entrenando para el maratón?
sentences.english: Has he been training for the marathon?

sentences.spanish: Has estado ahorrando dinero para un viaje.
sentences.english: You have been saving money for a trip.

sentences.spanish: Llevabas semanas esperando esa noticia.
sentences.english: You had been waiting for that news for weeks.

sentences.spanish: ¿Llevan mucho tiempo viviendo en esa ciudad?
sentences.english: Have they been living in that city for a long time?

sentences.spanish: Has estado pensando en cambiar de carrera.
sentences.english: You have been thinking about changing careers.

sentences.spanish: Te has sentido más feliz últimamente.
sentences.english: You have been feeling happier lately.

sentences.spanish: Si yo fuera tú, no compraría un móvil tan caro.
sentences.english: If I were you, I wouldn't buy such an expensive cellphone.

sentences.spanish: Si me ganara la lotería, viajaría por el mundo.
sentences.english: If I won the lottery, I would travel the world.

sentences.spanish: Los niños no odiarían la escuela si fuera divertida.
sentences.english: Kids wouldn't hate school if it was fun.

sentences.spanish: ¿Por qué elegirías estudiar en Estados Unidos en lugar de aprovechar la oportunidad de estudiar en Londres?
sentences.english: Why would you choose to study in the United States instead of taking the opportunity to study in London?

sentences.spanish: Si tuviera los documentos ya se los habría mostrado al juez.
sentences.english: If she had the documents, she would have already shown them to the judge.

sentences.spanish: Si mi médico me dijera que me quedan dos meses de vida, pasaría tiempo con mis seres queridos.
sentences.english: If my doctor told me I had two months to live, I would spend time with my loved ones.

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué animal te gustaría ser si fueras uno?
sentences.english: What animal would you like to be if you were one?

sentences.spanish: Si tuviera superpoderes, tal vez podría volar.
sentences.english: If I had superpowers, maybe I could fly.

sentences.spanish: ¿Adónde te gustaría ir en tus próximas vacaciones si tuvieras suficiente dinero?
sentences.english: Where would you like to go on your next vacation if you had enough money?

sentences.spanish: ¿Qué harías si terminaras tu curso de inglés hoy?
sentences.english: What would you do if you finished your English course today?

sentences.spanish: Si hubieras llegado a tiempo a la entrevista de trabajo te habrían contratado.
sentences.english: If you had arrived on time to the job interview, they would have hired you.

sentences.spanish: Si hubieras sabido que ella vendría, habrías usado una camiseta diferente.
sentences.english: If you had known that she was coming, you would have worn a different shirt.

sentences.spanish: Tu novio/novia no se habría enojado si no hubieras olvidado tu aniversario.
sentences.english: Your boyfriend/girlfriend wouldn't have gotten mad if you hadn't forgotten your anniversary.

sentences.spanish: Habrías pedido el pastel de coco si no hubiera tenido pasas.
sentences.english: You would have ordered the coconut cake if it hadn't had raisins.

sentences.spanish: ¿Habrían podido terminar el proyecto si hubieran tenido más tiempo?
sentences.english: Would they have been able to finish the project if they had more time?

sentences.spanish: No habrías nacido si tus padres no se hubieran conocido.
sentences.english: You wouldn't have been born if your parents hadn't met.

sentences.spanish: Si tuvieras más tiempo, lo pasarías con tu familia.
sentences.english: If you had more time, you would spend it with your family.

sentences.spanish: No te habrías enojado tanto si te hubiera dicho la verdad.
sentences.english: You wouldn't have gotten so angry if he had told you the truth.

sentences.spanish: No habríamos roto si no hubieras ido a Nueva York.
sentences.english: We wouldn't have broken up if you hadn't gone to New York.

sentences.spanish: Brasil podría haber ganado el Mundial de Rusia si Bélgica no los hubiera derrotado.
sentences.english: Brazil could have won the World Cup in Russia if Belgium hadn't defeated them.

sentences.spanish: Si quieres ganar más dinero, deberías buscar trabajo en el extranjero.
sentences.english: If you want to earn more money, you should look for a job abroad.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona que está contigo qué haría si tuviera un millón de dólares.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you what they would do if they had a million dollars.

sentences.spanish: Si ganaras la lotería, viajarías por el mundo.
sentences.english: If you won the lottery, you would travel the world.

sentences.spanish: Si no hubieran estado bebiendo, no habrían tenido ese accidente fatal.
sentences.english: If they hadn't been drinking, they wouldn't have had that fatal accident.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona que está contigo qué haría si alguien la asaltara.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you what they would do if someone mugged them.

sentences.spanish: Si hubiera hablado contigo, la habrías escuchado y le habrías dado buenos consejos.
sentences.english: If she had talked to you, you would have listened to her and given her good advice.

sentences.spanish: Si queremos trabajar más rápido, necesitaremos una computadora más nueva.
sentences.english: If we want to work faster, we'll need a newer computer.

sentences.spanish: Pregúntale a la persona que está contigo si le prestaría dinero a Mike y recuérdale que no le devolvió el dinero la última vez.
sentences.english: Ask the person with you if they would lend money to Mike, and remind them that he didn't pay them back last time.

sentences.spanish: El cemento traslúcido fue lanzado hace un par de años por una empresa mexicana.
sentences.english: Translucent cement was launched a couple of years ago by a Mexican company.

sentences.spanish: John debería ser ascendido el próximo año ya que fue el mejor trabajador durante este año.
sentences.english: John should be promoted next year as he was the best worker during this year.

sentences.spanish: Aún no se ha descubierto la cura para el cáncer; sin embargo, los científicos continúan buscándolo.
sentences.english: The cure for cancer has not been discovered yet; however, scientists continue to search for it.

sentences.spanish: ¿Quién escribió la Ilíada?
sentences.english: Who was the Iliad written by?

sentences.spanish: ¿El sistema de justicia encarcelará a los gobernadores corruptos?
sentences.english: Will corrupt governors be imprisoned by the justice system?

sentences.spanish: Mary no vino a la fiesta porque no estaba invitada.
sentences.english: Mary didn't come to the party because she wasn't invited.

sentences.spanish: Los niños están emocionados porque los llevarán al zoológico.
sentences.english: The children are excited because they will be taken to the zoo.

sentences.spanish: ¿Por qué la mayoría de las celebridades odian ser fotografiadas por paparazzi?
sentences.english: Why do most celebrities hate being photographed by paparazzi?

sentences.spanish: ¿Cuántos niños nacen cada día en este hospital?
sentences.english: How many children are born each day in this hospital?

sentences.spanish: Javier Duarte será juzgado el próximo año y es posible que sea encarcelado.
sentences.english: Javier Duarte will be tried next year, and it's possible that he will be imprisoned.

sentences.spanish: No encuentro mi nombre en la lista, pero seguiré buscando.
sentences.english: I can't find my name on the list, but I will keep searching.

sentences.spanish: Me pondré en contacto con el ingeniero en Minnesota.
sentences.english: I will get in touch with the engineer in Minnesota.

sentences.spanish: Todavía no he encontrado a la persona que busco.
sentences.english: I still haven't found the person I'm looking for.

sentences.spanish: ¿Por qué esos niños excluyeron a Sophie del juego?
sentences.english: Why did those children exclude Sophie from the game?

sentences.spanish: David y Martha adelantaron su boda porque la mayoría de sus amigos no pudieron asistir en diciembre.
sentences.english: David and Martha moved up their wedding because most of their friends couldn't attend in December.

sentences.spanish: Mi auto necesita reparaciones.
sentences.english: My car needs repairs.

sentences.spanish: ¿No piensas dejar de fumar?
sentences.english: Don't you plan on quitting smoking?

sentences.spanish: Esas personas necesitan detenerse y pensar en sus acciones.
sentences.english: Those people need to stop and think about their actions.

sentences.spanish: Ella no pudo evitar enamorarse de él.
sentences.english: She couldn't help but fall in love with him.

sentences.spanish: Debes caminar dos cuadras más por esta misma calle para llegar al parque central.
sentences.english: You need to walk two more blocks on this same street to reach the central park.

sentences.spanish: Sé que no quiso decir eso, pero de todos modos me dolió.
sentences.english: I know she didn't mean to say that, but it hurt me anyway.

sentences.spanish: Para mí la infidelidad significa decir adiós.
sentences.english: To me, infidelity means saying goodbye.

sentences.spanish: ¿Quieres seguir viviendo así?
sentences.english: Do you want to continue living like this?

sentences.spanish: Después de la reunión, iremos a tomar unas copas.
sentences.english: After the meeting, we'll go grab some drinks.

sentences.spanish: Ya hablé con él, pero todavía cree en otra cosa.
sentences.english: I already spoke to him, but he still believes something else.

sentences.spanish: Ese libro cambió mi vida.
sentences.english: That book changed my life.

sentences.spanish: Está lloviendo.
sentences.english: It 's raining.

sentences.spanish: ¿La clase de manejo puede ser el domingo?
sentences.english: Can the driving lesson be on Sunday?

sentences.spanish: No me gusta nadar solo.
sentences.english: I don’t like swimming alone.

sentences.spanish: La sala de lectura es un lugar muy tranquilo.
sentences.english: The reading room is a very peaceful place.

sentences.spanish: María está hablando con su jefe.
sentences.english: Mary is talking to her boss.

sentences.spanish: No me mientas.
sentences.english: Don’t lie to me.

sentences.spanish: Camine hacia el norte por la Quinta Avenida.
sentences.english: Walk to the north on Fifth Avenue.

sentences.spanish: Gire a la derecha en la esquina de Arlington Street.
sentences.english: Turn right on the corner of Arlington Street.

sentences.spanish: Camine recto 100 metros por Arlington Road y encontrará un Macdonald's a la izquierda.
sentences.english: Walk straight 100 meters on Arlington Road and you will find a Macdonald’s on the left.

sentences.spanish: Pide una hamburguesa con queso y patatas fritas y tráemelas.
sentences.english: Ask for a cheese burger and chips and bring them to me.

sentences.spanish: Insistió en que Peter se fuera inmediatamente.
sentences.english: He insisted that Peter leave immediately.

sentences.spanish: Janet convenció a Danielle para que me llevara al aeropuerto.
sentences.english: Janet convinced Danielle to take me to the airport.

sentences.spanish: Gary está instalando el estéreo en mi auto en su garaje.
sentences.english: Gary is installing the stereo in my car in his garage.

sentences.spanish: Le pidió a su hermana que me tradujera el artículo.
sentences.english: She asked her sister to translate the article for me.

sentences.spanish: Finalmente convencí a mi arrendador para que cambiara la cerradura.
sentences.english: I finally convinced my landlord to change the lock.

sentences.spanish: Mi mamá insistió en que usara ese vestido para la fiesta.
sentences.english: My mom insisted that I wear that dress to the party.

sentences.spanish: Le pediré a John que me recoja en la estación.
sentences.english: I will ask John to pick me up at the station.

sentences.spanish: Me pidió que comprara algunos bocadillos para la reunión.
sentences.english: She asked me to buy some snacks for the gathering.

sentences.spanish: La policía insistió en que deberíamos quedarnos en casa.
sentences.english: The police insisted that we should stay at home.

sentences.spanish: Intentaré convencerlo de que me pague el dinero que me debe.
sentences.english: I will try to convince him to pay me the money he owes.

sentences.spanish: La recepcionista me pidió que esperara afuera de su oficina.
sentences.english: The receptionist asked me to wait outside her office.

sentences.spanish: El médico insistió en que fuéramos al hospital.
sentences.english: The doctor insisted that we go to the hospital.
